message.content: Find the most recent screenshot in C:\Users\Administrator\Pictures\Screenshots folder, read it, and analyze the content. The user says: "상단에 연결 해제 버튼 정렬 안됨 우측에 라벨은 제거 해줘 하단에 나오니" - The connect/disconnect buttons at the top are misaligned, and the label on the right side should be removed since the info is shown at the bottom.

content.text: 스크린샷 내용 분석 완료. 현재 프로젝트 파일을 확인하겠습니다.
이제 MainWindow.xaml을 읽어서 현재 상단 레이아웃을 확인하겠습니다.

content.content:
1→<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.MainWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        Title="1CELL Assemble Machine" Height="600" Width="900"
     5→        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
     6→        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen">
     7→    <Grid>
     8→        <StackPanel VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
     9→            <TextBlock Text="1CELL Assemble Machine" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold"
    10→                       Foreground="#569CD6" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>
    11→            <TextBlock Text="PC-Based Control Monitor" FontSize="16"
    12→                       Foreground="#808080" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,0,40"/>
    13→
    14→            <Button Content="서보 제어 열기" Width="240" Height="50" FontSize="18"
    15→                    FontWeight="Bold" Background="#1B5E20" Foreground="White"
    16→                    BorderThickness="0" Click="BtnServoControl_Click" Cursor="Hand" Margin="0,0,0,12">
    17→                <Button.Style>
    18→                    <Style TargetType="Button">
    19→                        <Setter Property="Template">
    20→                            <Setter.Value>
    21→                                <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    22→                                    <Border x:Name="Bd" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
    23→                                            CornerRadius="6" Padding="10">
    24→                                        <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    25→                                    </Border>
    26→                                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    27→                                        <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    28→                                            <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#2E7D32"/>
    29→                                        </Trigger>
    30→                                        <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
    31→                                            <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#1B5E20"/>
    32→                                        </Trigger>
    33→                                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    34→                                </ControlTemplate>
    35→                            </Setter.Value>
    36→                        </Setter>
    37→                    </Style>
    38→                </Button.Style>
    39→            </Button>
    40→
    41→            <Button Content="I/O 모니터 열기" Width="240" Height="50" FontSize="18"
    42→                    FontWeight="Bold" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
    43→                    BorderThickness="0" Click="BtnIoMonitor_Click" Cursor="Hand">
    44→                <Button.Style>
    45→                    <Style TargetType="Button">
    46→                        <Setter Property="Template">
    47→                            <Setter.Value>
    48→                                <ControlTemplate TargetType="Button">
    49→                                    <Border x:Name="Bd" Background="{TemplateBinding Background}"
    50→                                            CornerRadius="6" Padding="10">
    51→                                        <ContentPresenter HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
    52→                                    </Border>
    53→                                    <ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    54→                                        <Trigger Property="IsMouseOver" Value="True">
    55→                                            <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#1A8CD8"/>
    56→                                        </Trigger>
    57→                                        <Trigger Property="IsPressed" Value="True">
    58→                                            <Setter TargetName="Bd" Property="Background" Value="#005A9E"/>
    59→                                        </Trigger>
    60→                                    </ControlTemplate.Triggers>
    61→                                </ControlTemplate>
    62→                            </Setter.Value>
    63→                        </Setter>
    64→                    </Style>
    65→                </Button.Style>
    66→            </Button>
    67→        </StackPanel>
    68→    </Grid>
    69→</Window>
    70→

content.text: 스크린샷과 이 파일은 MainWindow가 아니라 IoMonitorWindow 쪽 UI로 보입니다. 스크린샷에서 "연결/해제" 버튼과 우측 상태 라벨이 보이므로 IoMonitorWindow.xaml을 확인합니다.

content.content:
1→<Window x:Class="AssembleMonitor.Features.IoMonitor.IoMonitorWindow"
     2→        xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml/presentation"
     3→        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
     4→        Title="I/O 모니터 — 1CELL Assemble" Width="1920" Height="1040"
     5→        Background="#1E1E1E" Foreground="#E0E0E0"
     6→        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen" WindowState="Maximized">
     7→
     8→    <Window.Resources>
     9→        <BooleanToVisibilityConverter x:Key="BoolToVis"/>
    10→
    11→        <!-- 입력 비트 ON → 녹색 배경 행 -->
    12→        <Style x:Key="InputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
    13→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
    14→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
    15→            <Style.Triggers>
    16→                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
    17→                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1B3A1B"/>
    18→                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#4CAF50"/>
    19→                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
    20→                </DataTrigger>
    21→            </Style.Triggers>
    22→        </Style>
    23→
    24→        <!-- 출력 비트 ON → 주황 배경 행 -->
    25→        <Style x:Key="OutputRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
    26→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
    27→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
    28→            <Style.Triggers>
    29→                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
    30→                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3A2A0A"/>
    31→                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FF9800"/>
    32→                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
    33→                </DataTrigger>
    34→            </Style.Triggers>
    35→        </Style>
    36→
    37→        <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 ON → 파랑 배경 행 -->
    38→        <Style x:Key="ServoRowStyle" TargetType="DataGridRow">
    39→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#252526"/>
    40→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
    41→            <Style.Triggers>
    42→                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
    43→                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#0A1A3A"/>
    44→                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#2196F3"/>
    45→                    <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="Bold"/>
    46→                </DataTrigger>
    47→            </Style.Triggers>
    48→        </Style>
    49→
    50→        <!-- 다크 테마 기본 스타일 -->
    51→        <Style TargetType="DataGrid">
    52→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#1E1E1E"/>
    53→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
    54→            <Setter Property="RowBackground" Value="#252526"/>
    55→            <Setter Property="AlternatingRowBackground" Value="#2D2D30"/>
    56→            <Setter Property="GridLinesVisibility" Value="Horizontal"/>
    57→            <Setter Property="HorizontalGridLinesBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
    58→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
    59→            <Setter Property="HeadersVisibility" Value="Column"/>
    60→            <Setter Property="AutoGenerateColumns" Value="False"/>
    61→            <Setter Property="IsReadOnly" Value="True"/>
    62→            <Setter Property="CanUserAddRows" Value="False"/>
    63→            <Setter Property="CanUserResizeRows" Value="False"/>
    64→            <Setter Property="CanUserSortColumns" Value="False"/>
    65→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
    66→            <Setter Property="RowHeight" Value="18"/>
    67→        </Style>
    68→        <Style TargetType="DataGridColumnHeader">
    69→            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#333337"/>
    70→            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#E0E0E0"/>
    71→            <Setter Property="Padding" Value="4,3"/>
    72→            <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#3F3F46"/>
    73→            <Setter Property="BorderThickness" Value="0,0,1,1"/>
    74→            <Setter Property="FontWeight" Value="SemiBold"/>
    75→            <Setter Property="FontSize" Value="10"/>
    76→        </Style>
    77→    </Window.Resources>
    78→
    79→    <Grid>
    80→        <Grid.RowDefinitions>
    81→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    82→            <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
    83→            <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
    84→        </Grid.RowDefinitions>
    85→
    86→        <!-- 상단: 좌=버튼+상태, 우=LED패널(고정) -->
    87→        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#333337" Padding="8,4">
    88→            <DockPanel>
    89→                <!-- 우측 고정: LED 패널 + 이름저장 -->
    90→                <StackPanel DockPanel.Dock="Right" Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
    91→                    <Button Content="이름 저장" Width="70" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
    92→                            Click="BtnSaveNames_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
    93→                            BorderThickness="0" FontSize="10"/>
    94→                    <Border Padding="4,2" Background="#252526" CornerRadius="3">
    95→                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
    96→                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
    97→                                <Ellipse.Style>
    98→                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
    99→                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   100→                                        <Style.Triggers>
   101→                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcCommOk}" Value="True">
   102→                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
   103→                                            </DataTrigger>
   104→                                        </Style.Triggers>
   105→                                    </Style>
   106→                                </Ellipse.Style>
   107→                            </Ellipse>
   108→                            <TextBlock Text="COMM" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
   109→
   110→                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   111→                                <Ellipse.Style>
   112→                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   113→                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   114→                                        <Style.Triggers>
   115→                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcRun}" Value="True">
   116→                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
   117→                                            </DataTrigger>
   118→                                        </Style.Triggers>
   119→                                    </Style>
   120→                                </Ellipse.Style>
   121→                            </Ellipse>
   122→                            <TextBlock Text="RUN" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
   123→
   124→                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   125→                                <Ellipse.Style>
   126→                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   127→                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   128→                                        <Style.Triggers>
   129→                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcEmoActive}" Value="True">
   130→                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
   131→                                            </DataTrigger>
   132→                                        </Style.Triggers>
   133→                                    </Style>
   134→                                </Ellipse.Style>
   135→                            </Ellipse>
   136→                            <TextBlock Text="EMO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
   137→
   138→                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   139→                                <Ellipse.Style>
   140→                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   141→                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   142→                                        <Style.Triggers>
   143→                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcWdTimeout}" Value="True">
   144→                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
   145→                                            </DataTrigger>
   146→                                        </Style.Triggers>
   147→                                    </Style>
   148→                                </Ellipse.Style>
   149→                            </Ellipse>
   150→                            <TextBlock Text="WD" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,6,0"/>
   151→
   152→                            <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10" Margin="4,0">
   153→                                <Ellipse.Style>
   154→                                    <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   155→                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555"/>
   156→                                        <Style.Triggers>
   157→                                            <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding PlcServoErr}" Value="True">
   158→                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#F44336"/>
   159→                                            </DataTrigger>
   160→                                        </Style.Triggers>
   161→                                    </Style>
   162→                                </Ellipse.Style>
   163→                            </Ellipse>
   164→                            <TextBlock Text="SERVO" Foreground="#AAA" FontSize="10" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
   165→                        </StackPanel>
   166→                    </Border>
   167→                </StackPanel>
   168→
   169→                <!-- 좌측: 버튼 + 상태 텍스트 -->
   170→                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
   171→                    <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
   172→                            Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
   173→                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
   174→                    <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
   175→                            Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
   176→                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
   177→                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
   178→                               FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
   179→                </StackPanel>
   180→            </DockPanel>
   181→        </Border>
   182→
   183→        <!-- 메인: 3컬럼 (입력 | 출력 | 서보+시스템) -->
   184→        <Grid Grid.Row="1" Margin="2,2,2,0">
   185→            <Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   186→                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   187→                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
   188→                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   189→                <ColumnDefinition Width="2"/>
   190→                <ColumnDefinition Width="*"/>
   191→            </Grid.ColumnDefinitions>
   192→
   193→            <!-- ===== 입력 컬럼 ===== -->
   194→            <Border Grid.Column="0" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
   195→                <Grid>
   196→                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   197→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   198→                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   199→                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   200→                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#1B3A1B" Padding="6,4">
   201→                        <TextBlock Text="입력 (MW0100~0109)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#4CAF50"/>
   202→                    </Border>
   203→                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   204→                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding InputWords}">
   205→                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   206→                                <DataTemplate>
   207→                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
   208→                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
   209→                                        <StackPanel>
   210→                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
   211→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   212→                                                           Foreground="#569CD6" FontSize="10"/>
   213→                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   214→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
   215→                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   216→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   217→                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
   218→                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   219→                                            </StackPanel>
   220→                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
   221→                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
   222→                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource InputRowStyle}">
   223→                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
   224→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
   225→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   226→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   227→                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
   228→                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
   229→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   230→                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   231→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   232→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   233→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#4CAF50"/>
   234→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   235→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   236→                                                                        </Style>
   237→                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
   238→                                                                </Ellipse>
   239→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   240→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   241→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   242→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
   243→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   244→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
   245→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   246→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
   247→                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
   248→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   249→                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
   250→                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
   251→                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
   252→                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
   253→                                                            </Style>
   254→                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   255→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
   256→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
   257→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   258→                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
   259→                                            </DataGrid>
   260→                                        </StackPanel>
   261→                                    </Border>
   262→                                </DataTemplate>
   263→                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   264→                        </ItemsControl>
   265→                    </ScrollViewer>
   266→                </Grid>
   267→            </Border>
   268→
   269→            <!-- 구분선1 -->
   270→            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="1" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
   271→                          Background="#3F3F46"/>
   272→
   273→            <!-- ===== 출력 컬럼 ===== -->
   274→            <Border Grid.Column="2" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
   275→                <Grid>
   276→                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   277→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   278→                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   279→                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   280→                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#3A2A0A" Padding="6,4">
   281→                        <TextBlock Text="출력 (MW0200~0209)" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#FF9800"/>
   282→                    </Border>
   283→                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   284→                        <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding OutputWords}">
   285→                            <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   286→                                <DataTemplate>
   287→                                    <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
   288→                                            BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
   289→                                        <StackPanel>
   290→                                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
   291→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   292→                                                           Foreground="#CE9178" FontSize="10"/>
   293→                                                <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   294→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
   295→                                                <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   296→                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   297→                                                           FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
   298→                                                <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   299→                                            </StackPanel>
   300→                                            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
   301→                                                     IsReadOnly="False"
   302→                                                     RowStyle="{StaticResource OutputRowStyle}">
   303→                                                <DataGrid.Columns>
   304→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
   305→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   306→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   307→                                                                <Button Click="BtnOutputToggle_Click"
   308→                                                                        Tag="{Binding}"
   309→                                                                        CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
   310→                                                                        Height="18" Width="32"
   311→                                                                        FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
   312→                                                                        BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
   313→                                                                        Focusable="False">
   314→                                                                    <Button.Style>
   315→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Button">
   316→                                                                            <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
   317→                                                                            <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
   318→                                                                            <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   319→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   320→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   321→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
   322→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#FF9800"/>
   323→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
   324→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   325→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   326→                                                                        </Style>
   327→                                                                    </Button.Style>
   328→                                                                </Button>
   329→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   330→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   331→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   332→                                                    <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
   333→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   334→                                                            <DataTemplate>
   335→                                                                <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
   336→                                                                    <Ellipse.Style>
   337→                                                                        <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   338→                                                                            <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   339→                                                                            <Style.Triggers>
   340→                                                                                <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   341→                                                                                    <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#FF9800"/>
   342→                                                                                </DataTrigger>
   343→                                                                            </Style.Triggers>
   344→                                                                        </Style>
   345→                                                                    </Ellipse.Style>
   346→                                                                </Ellipse>
   347→                                                            </DataTemplate>
   348→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   349→                                                    </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   350→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
   351→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   352→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
   353→                                                                       IsReadOnly="True"/>
   354→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
   355→                                                                       Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
   356→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   357→                                                            <Style TargetType="TextBox">
   358→                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
   359→                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
   360→                                                                <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
   361→                                                            </Style>
   362→                                                        </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   363→                                                    </DataGridTextColumn>
   364→                                                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"

   366→                                                </DataGrid.Columns>
   367→                                            </DataGrid>
   368→                                        </StackPanel>
   369→                                    </Border>
   370→                                </DataTemplate>
   371→                            </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   372→                        </ItemsControl>
   373→                    </ScrollViewer>
   374→                </Grid>
   375→            </Border>
   376→
   377→            <!-- 구분선2 -->
   378→            <GridSplitter Grid.Column="3" Width="2" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
   379→                          Background="#3F3F46"/>
   380→
   381→            <!-- ===== 서보+시스템 컬럼 ===== -->
   382→            <Border Grid.Column="4" BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="1" Margin="1">
   383→                <Grid>
   384→                    <Grid.RowDefinitions>
   385→                        <RowDefinition Height="Auto"/>
   386→                        <RowDefinition Height="*"/>
   387→                    </Grid.RowDefinitions>
   388→                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#0A1A3A" Padding="6,4">
   389→                        <TextBlock Text="서보 / 시스템" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="12" Foreground="#2196F3"/>
   390→                    </Border>
   391→                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" VerticalScrollBarVisibility="Auto">
   392→                        <StackPanel>
   393→                            <!-- 서보 파라미터 값 표시 -->
   394→                            <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="6" Background="#252526"
   395→                                    BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
   396→                                <StackPanel>
   397→                                    <TextBlock Text="서보 파라미터/상태값" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="11"
   398→                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
   399→                                    <UniformGrid Columns="2" Rows="4">
   400→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   401→                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 위치" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   402→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   403→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   404→                                        </StackPanel>
   405→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   406→                                            <TextBlock Text="목표 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   407→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TargetVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   408→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   409→                                        </StackPanel>
   410→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   411→                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (raw)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   412→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPos}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   413→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   414→                                        </StackPanel>
   415→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   416→                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   417→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   418→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   419→                                        </StackPanel>
   420→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   421→                                            <TextBlock Text="현재 위치 (도)" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   422→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ActPosDeg}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   423→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#4FC1FF"/>
   424→                                        </StackPanel>
   425→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   426→                                            <TextBlock Text="조그 속도" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   427→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding JogVel}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   428→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#B5CEA8"/>
   429→                                        </StackPanel>
   430→                                        <StackPanel Margin="2">
   431→                                            <TextBlock Text="에러 코드" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   432→                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding ErrCode}" FontFamily="Consolas"
   433→                                                       FontSize="14" Foreground="#F44747"/>
   434→                                        </StackPanel>
   435→                                    </UniformGrid>
   436→                                </StackPanel>
   437→                            </Border>
   438→
   439→                            <!-- 서보/시스템 비트 목록 -->
   440→                            <ItemsControl ItemsSource="{Binding ServoSystemWords}">
   441→                                <ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   442→                                    <DataTemplate>
   443→                                        <Border Margin="2,2,2,0" Padding="4" Background="#252526"
   444→                                                BorderBrush="#3F3F46" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
   445→                                            <StackPanel>
   446→                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Margin="0,0,0,2">
   447→                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding MwAddress}" FontWeight="Bold"
   448→                                                               Foreground="#DCDCAA" FontSize="10"/>
   449→                                                    <TextBlock Text=" — " Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   450→                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Foreground="#9CDCFE" FontSize="10"/>
   451→                                                    <TextBlock Text="  [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   452→                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Direction}" Foreground="#C586C0" FontSize="10"/>
   453→                                                    <TextBlock Text="] [" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   454→                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding HexValue}" Foreground="#B5CEA8"
   455→                                                               FontFamily="Consolas" FontSize="10"/>
   456→                                                    <TextBlock Text="]" Foreground="#808080" FontSize="10"/>
   457→                                                </StackPanel>
   458→                                                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Bits}" Margin="0"
   459→                                                         IsReadOnly="False"
   460→                                                         RowStyle="{StaticResource ServoRowStyle}">
   461→                                                    <DataGrid.Columns>
   462→                                                        <!-- SET 버튼: WRITE 방향일 때만 표시 -->
   463→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="SET" Width="38">
   464→                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   465→                                                                <DataTemplate>
   466→                                                                    <Button Click="BtnServoToggle_Click"
   467→                                                                            Tag="{Binding}"
   468→                                                                            CommandParameter="{Binding DataContext, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}}"
   469→                                                                            Height="18" Width="32"
   470→                                                                            FontSize="9" FontWeight="Bold"
   471→                                                                            BorderThickness="0" Cursor="Hand"
   472→                                                                            Focusable="False"
   473→                                                                            Visibility="{Binding DataContext.IsWritable, RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType=DataGrid}, Converter={StaticResource BoolToVis}}">
   474→                                                                        <Button.Style>
   475→                                                                            <Style TargetType="Button">
   476→                                                                                <Setter Property="Content" Value="OFF"/>
   477→                                                                                <Setter Property="Background" Value="#444"/>
   478→                                                                                <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#999"/>
   479→                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
   480→                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   481→                                                                                        <Setter Property="Content" Value="ON"/>
   482→                                                                                        <Setter Property="Background" Value="#2196F3"/>
   483→                                                                                        <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="White"/>
   484→                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
   485→                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
   486→                                                                            </Style>
   487→                                                                        </Button.Style>
   488→                                                                    </Button>
   489→                                                                </DataTemplate>
   490→                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   491→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   492→                                                        <DataGridTemplateColumn Header="" Width="20">
   493→                                                            <DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   494→                                                                <DataTemplate>
   495→                                                                    <Ellipse Width="10" Height="10">
   496→                                                                        <Ellipse.Style>
   497→                                                                            <Style TargetType="Ellipse">
   498→                                                                                <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#555555"/>
   499→                                                                                <Style.Triggers>
   500→                                                                                    <DataTrigger Binding="{Binding IsOn}" Value="True">
   501→                                                                                        <Setter Property="Fill" Value="#2196F3"/>
   502→                                                                                    </DataTrigger>
   503→                                                                                </Style.Triggers>
   504→                                                                            </Style>
   505→                                                                        </Ellipse.Style>
   506→                                                                    </Ellipse>
   507→                                                                </DataTemplate>
   508→                                                            </DataGridTemplateColumn.CellTemplate>
   509→                                                        </DataGridTemplateColumn>
   510→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="Bit" Binding="{Binding BitIndex}" Width="30"
   511→                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
   512→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="주소" Binding="{Binding Address}" Width="80"
   513→                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
   514→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="이름" Binding="{Binding Name, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
   515→                                                                           Width="*" IsReadOnly="False">
   516→                                                            <DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   517→                                                                <Style TargetType="TextBox">
   518→                                                                    <Setter Property="Background" Value="#3C3C3C"/>
   519→                                                                    <Setter Property="Foreground" Value="#FFD700"/>
   520→                                                                    <Setter Property="BorderBrush" Value="#007ACC"/>
   521→                                                                </Style>
   522→                                                            </DataGridTextColumn.EditingElementStyle>
   523→                                                        </DataGridTextColumn>
   524→                                                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="" Binding="{Binding DisplayState}" Width="30"
   525→                                                                           IsReadOnly="True"/>
   526→                                                    </DataGrid.Columns>
   527→                                                </DataGrid>
   528→                                            </StackPanel>
   529→                                        </Border>
   530→                                    </DataTemplate>
   531→                                </ItemsControl.ItemTemplate>
   532→                            </ItemsControl>
   533→                        </StackPanel>
   534→                    </ScrollViewer>
   535→                </Grid>
   536→            </Border>
   537→        </Grid>
   538→
   539→        <!-- 하단: 상태바 -->
   540→        <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="#007ACC" Padding="6,3">
   541→            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal">
   542→                <TextBlock Text="PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="10"/>
   543→                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CycleMs, StringFormat='주기: {0}ms'}"
   544→                           Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontSize="10"/>
   545→                <TextBlock Text="입력: MW0100~0109 | 출력: MW0200~0209 | 서보: MW0300~0501"
   546→                           Foreground="#B0D4F1" FontSize="10"/>
   547→            </StackPanel>
   548→        </Border>
   549→    </Grid>
   550→</Window>
   551→

content.text:
스크린샷과 코드 분석 완료. 문제가 명확합니다.

**스크린샷 분석:**
- 상단 바에서 "연결" / "해제" 버튼과 그 오른쪽의 `ConnectionStatus` TextBlock ("연결됨 (192.168.0.50) — 55ms | PC:80 PLC:207 | RUN")이 같은 StackPanel에 있음
- 이 정보는 이미 하단 상태바에 표시됨

**문제:**
1. "연결/해제" 버튼이 세로 정렬 안됨 — `VerticalAlignment="Center"` 는 있으나 버튼들 Height 불일치나 StackPanel 높이 문제
2. 우측 `ConnectionStatus` TextBlock → 하단에 이미 나오므로 제거

**수정 계획:**
- `ConnectionStatus` TextBlock 제거 (라인 177~179)
- 버튼 정렬: StackPanel에 `Height` 고정 또는 `VerticalAlignment="Center"` 확실히 적용

input.old_string:
<!-- 좌측: 버튼 + 상태 텍스트 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                            Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                    <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                            Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding ConnectionStatus}" VerticalAlignment="Center"
                               FontSize="12" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                </StackPanel>
input.new_string:
<!-- 좌측: 연결/해제 버튼 -->
                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <Button Content="연결" Width="60" Height="26" Margin="0,0,6,0"
                            Click="BtnConnect_Click" Background="#007ACC" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"
                            VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                    <Button Content="해제" Width="60" Height="26"
                            Click="BtnDisconnect_Click" Background="#C62828" Foreground="White"
                            BorderThickness="0" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="10"
                            VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                </StackPanel>

content.text: 앱이 실행 중이라 EXE 파일이 잠겨있습니다. 빌드 자체(컴파일)는 성공이고 EXE 복사만 실패한 상황. 오류 수를 확인합니다.

input.command: cd "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/1cellAssembleMachine/PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor" && dotnet build -c Debug --nologo 2>&1 | grep -E "^.*error CS|^Build succeeded|^.*오류.*개"
input.description: Check for C# compile errors only

input.command: cd "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/1cellAssembleMachine/PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor" && dotnet build -c Debug --nologo 2>&1 | grep "error" | grep -v MSB
input.description: Check only CS compile errors (not MSBuild file copy errors)

content.text:
CS 컴파일 오류 없음. MSB 오류 2개는 실행 중인 앱이 EXE를 잠근 것뿐 — XAML/C# 코드 컴파일은 성공.

수정 완료입니다.

---

**변경 내용 요약:**

파일: `C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/1cellAssembleMachine/PLC_ST/c#/AssembleMonitor/Features/IoMonitor/IoMonitorWindow.xaml`

1. **ConnectionStatus TextBlock 제거** (라인 177~179) — `연결됨 (192.168.0.50) — 55ms | PC:80 PLC:207 | RUN` 텍스트. 동일 정보가 하단 상태바(`PLC: 192.168.0.50:2004`, `주기: {0}ms`)에 이미 표시됨

2. **버튼 정렬 수정** — "해제" 버튼의 `Margin="0,0,12,0"` 제거 (우측에 텍스트 없어지므로 불필요), 양쪽 버튼에 `VerticalAlignment="Center"` 명시 추가

앱을 재시작하면 변경 사항이 적용됩니다.
